task_completion.description: Verify that the three required tracks are created and named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the track headers on the left side of the Ardour editor. You should see three tracks explicitly named 'Ambient BGM', 'Scare Left', and 'Scare Right'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct audio files are placed at the specified timestamps on their respective tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the timeline. On 'Ambient BGM', a region (moonlight_sonata) should start at 0:00. On 'Scare Left', a region (narration) should start at 0:10 (10 seconds). On 'Scare Right', a region (narration) should start at 0:20 (20 seconds).

task_completion.description: Verify the gain for Ambient BGM and the panning for the Scare tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the mixer strip or track header, the 'Ambient BGM' fader should be set to approximately -6 dB. The pan knob/slider for 'Scare Left' should be turned 100% to the left (L), and for 'Scare Right' 100% to the right (R).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Scare Left' and 'Scare Right' are in a Route Group named 'Ride Effects' with gain sharing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a group tab or list on the left side showing 'Ride Effects'. The tracks 'Scare Left' and 'Scare Right' should have a group color indicator matching this group. Gain sharing might be indicated by a specific icon or text in the group properties.

task_completion.description: Verify that the session markers 'Gargoyle' and 'Ghost' are added at the correct times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Markers' ruler at the top of the timeline. There should be a marker labeled 'Gargoyle' exactly at 0:10.000 and another labeled 'Ghost' exactly at 0:20.000.

task_completion.description: Verify that the session was exported as a WAV file to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Ardour 'Export' dialog showing the file path '/home/ga/Audio/ride_export/ride_reference.wav', or a terminal/file manager showing this file exists.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Ardour GUI to configure the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour application open with visible interactions (mouse clicks, dialogs), rather than just terminal commands editing the Ardour session XML file.

integrity.description: Verify the export was performed through Ardour.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Ardour Export dialog or progress bar, ensuring the file wasn't just created using 'touch' or 'cp' in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that audio regions are actually present in the timeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: The timeline should show waveforms or colored blocks representing the audio regions, not just empty tracks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target BGM gain is -6 dB (acceptable range -9.0 to -3.0 dB). Scare Left should be at 10 seconds (441,000 samples) and Scare Right at 20 seconds (882,000 samples). Pan values in Ardour are represented visually; fully left and fully right are required. The export file must be named 'ride_reference.wav' in '/home/ga/Audio/ride_export/'.
